subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! Although the distance between us is vast, yet the bonds that unite our hearts are firm and mighty [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الله هر چند مسافه مابین بعید است ولکن روابط قلوب مستحکم وشدید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
